hypothesis: If the workflow's economic efficiency metrics were extended to incorporate real-time commodity price feeds and geopolitical supply-chain risk indices as dynamic input variables into the analysis module, then the optimal synthesis route recommendation for Ca2SiO4 (and analogous inorganic materials) would shift predictably and quantifiably between reagent combinations (e.g., from CaO+SiO2 to Ca3SiO5+Si3N4) at identifiable price-ratio thresholds, such that training a time-series machine learning model on historical reagent price data would enable anticipatory route-switching recommendations that outperform static thermodynamic-only rankings in realized production cost over multi-year manufacturing horizons.
